display_information.name: ContextBot
display_information.description: Ask anything about your codebase. Powered by ContextOS MCP — secrets auto-redacted.
display_information.long_description: ContextBot connects ContextOS MCP to Slack. Ask a question, get an AI answer backed by real code context — not hallucinations. Files are ranked by import centrality and keyword relevance. Secrets are automatically redacted before any code appears in Slack.
